'''forataka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jubate|jubate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-r-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jubate|jubate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| forataka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:foratithi|foratithi]] || [[word:foratiji|foratiji]] || [[word:foratishi|foratishi]] || [[word:foratiki|foratiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:foratuthuthu|foratuthuthu]] || [[word:foratujuju|foratujuju]] || [[word:foratushushu|foratushushu]] || [[word:foratukuku|foratukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:foratuthu|foratuthu]] || [[word:foratuju|foratuju]] || [[word:foratushu|foratushu]] || [[word:foratuku|foratuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:foratufthuf|foratufthuf]] || [[word:foratufjuf|foratufjuf]] || [[word:foratufshuf|foratufshuf]] || [[word:foratufkuf|foratufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:foratethe|foratethe]] || [[word:forateje|forateje]] || [[word:forateshe|forateshe]] || [[word:forateke|forateke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:foratothotho|foratothotho]] || [[word:foratojojo|foratojojo]] || [[word:foratoshosho|foratoshosho]] || [[word:foratokoko|foratokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:foratotho|foratotho]] || [[word:foratojo|foratojo]] || [[word:foratosho|foratosho]] || [[word:foratoko|foratoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:foratofthof|foratofthof]] || [[word:foratofjof|foratofjof]] || [[word:foratofshof|foratofshof]] || [[word:foratofkof|foratofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:foratÃŸfthÃŸf|foratÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:foratÃŸfjÃŸf|foratÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:foratÃŸfshÃŸf|foratÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:foratÃŸfkÃŸf|foratÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:foratÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|foratÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:foratÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|foratÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:foratÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|foratÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:foratÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|foratÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:foratÃŸfthÃŸf|foratÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:foratÃŸfjÃŸf|foratÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:foratÃŸfshÃŸf|foratÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:foratÃŸfkÃŸf|foratÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:foratÃŸfthÃŸf|foratÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:foratÃŸfjÃŸf|foratÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:foratÃŸfshÃŸf|foratÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:foratÃŸfkÃŸf|foratÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:foratÃḊthÃḊ|foratÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:foratÃḊjÃḊ|foratÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:foratÃḊshÃḊ|foratÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:foratÃḊkÃḊ|foratÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:foratathatha|foratathatha]] || [[word:foratajaja|foratajaja]] || [[word:foratashasha|foratashasha]] || [[word:foratakaka|foratakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:foratatha|foratatha]] || [[word:forataja|forataja]] || [[word:foratasha|foratasha]] || [[word:forataka|forataka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:foratafthaf|foratafthaf]] || [[word:foratafjaf|foratafjaf]] || [[word:foratafshaf|foratafshaf]] || [[word:foratafkaf|foratafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:foratasha|foratasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:foratshÃḋsha|foratshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:foratrosha|foratrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:foratmusha|foratmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:foratyasha|foratyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goforatnkshÃḋsha|goforatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goforatnkrosha|goforatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goforatnkmusha|goforatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goforatnkyasha|goforatnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:foraratasha|foraratasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:foraratshÃḋsha|foraratshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:foraratrosha|foraratrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:foraratmusha|foraratmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:foraratyasha|foraratyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goforaratnkshÃḋsha|goforaratnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goforaratnkrosha|goforaratnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goforaratnkmusha|goforaratnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goforaratnkyasha|goforaratnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ferÃḊtasha|ferÃḊtasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ferÃḊtshÃḋsha|ferÃḊtshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ferÃḊtrosha|ferÃḊtrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ferÃḊtmusha|ferÃḊtmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ferÃḊtyasha|ferÃḊtyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goferÃḊtnkshÃḋsha|goferÃḊtnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goferÃḊtnkrosha|goferÃḊtnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goferÃḊtnkmusha|goferÃḊtnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goferÃḊtnkyasha|goferÃḊtnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:forfatasha|forfatasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:forfatshÃḋsha|forfatshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:forfatrosha|forfatrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:forfatmusha|forfatmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:forfatyasha|forfatyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goforfatnkshÃḋsha|goforfatnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goforfatnkrosha|goforfatnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goforfatnkmusha|goforfatnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goforfatnkyasha|goforfatnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
